purchasingPreferences.title: Purchasing preferences
purchasingPreferences.subtitle: Set your preferred wine types, appellations, and monthly budget to personalize pallet discovery.

appellations.helper: Add up to {{count}} tags. Press Enter or comma to add.

errors.mustBeLoggedIn: You must be logged in to save preferences.
errors.minPositive: Minimum budget must be a positive number.
errors.maxPositive: Maximum budget must be a positive number.
errors.minGreaterThanMax: Minimum budget cannot be greater than maximum budget.
errors.appellationLimit: You can add up to {{count}} appellations.
